programmes.show_description: The Biggest Ballads from the royals of rock! From Queen, Bon Jovi & Whitesnake to Meat Loaf, Nickleback & Evanescence.
These are the legendary rock stars that made the 80s! Expect Meat Loaf, Bonnie Tyler, Queen, Bon Jovi, AC/DC, Iron Maiden & loads more!
One hour of pure laid back tracks and big power ballads from the 90s, every song with a huge chorus! Expect plenty of REM, Guns N Roses, Bon Jovi and Queen.
From our sister channel NOW 90s, 2 hours of songs that wouldn't have sounded out of place on Simon's 'Our Tune' slot on Radio 1 in the 90s. Including Chris Isaak & Jeff Buckley.
40 classic rock anthems back to back - one from the 90s followed by another from the 00s. Simple!
Number 1 rock songs from the last 50 years! With mega hits from the Arctic Monkeys & KOL right back to legends like The Stones & T.Rex!
Claire has 30 of her best alternative rock bands & artists who side-stepped classic rock to include influences from Punk, Funk, Goth, Indie & even Hip Hop!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
25 of the greatest rock bands of the noughties featuring Paramore, Bullet For My Valentine, Slipknot and My Chemical Romance.
Live it loud and Max out on the finest rock anthems! Featuring The White Stripes, Iron Maiden, Evanescense & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
From 2003 to 2015 - 30 minutes of the biggest rock songs from Muse!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
From angsty misfit anthems & teen rebellion, to non-conformers & pure emotional turbulence, these songs reminded us growing up that sometimes it's totally fine to feel different!
An hour of Nu Metal from the likes of Alien Ant Farm, Evanescence and Limp Bizkit to Korn, Linkin Park and Rage Against The Machine.
Mark Goodier with a countdown of bands and artists who've had one rock song that has been viewed over a billion times since the 00s.
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
Turn it up to 11 for the finest rock anthems! Featuring Kings Of Leon, The Killers, Green Day, Biffy Clyro & The Foo Fighters. This is Now Rock!
In order, an hour of every song a number 1 rock song in the noughties!
Live it loud and Max out on the finest rock anthems! Featuring The Arctic Monkeys, Nickleback, Green Day & The Strokes. This is Now Rock!
Jenny is back in the 90s with killer cuts and some proper full-on guitar action! Including Guns n Roses, Nirvana, Bon Jovi, Oasis, The Offspring and Lenny Kravitz.
Turn up your spreakers to 11 and live life even louder! 50 All-Killer Anthems in order from Blink 182 in 2000 to The Killers at the end of the Decade!
A decade of mega hits and the loudest anthems! Expect Biffy Clyro, Linkin Park, Blink 182, Evanescence, Fall Out Boy & loads more!
50 tracks we know you know - but how fast can you name them? One thing's for sure: after the first note, you'll be singing them all night long!
Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
Nicky Horne presents his favourite 30 rock party anthems of all time, featuring Led Zeppelin, Def Leppard, Thin Lizzy and David Bowie.
Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
Turn your amp up to 11 & make your mic roar! Here come 25 of the greatest 00s rock karaoke tracks. Featuring The Killers, Fall Out Boy, Arctic Monkeys & many more!
Party pop rock anthems spanning 5 decades! From Queen, Kiss & Aerosmith to Blur, Paramore & The White Stripes.
